title: Add realtime score-scoped procedures and evaluations
description: Implement realtime procedure/evaluation lists in scorecards dashboard, fix procedure dashboard create subscriptions, standardize task matching, and refresh optimizer manifests with debounce.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented realtime score-scoped procedure/evaluation lists, canonical card GraphQL field sets, procedure dashboard create/update subscription widening, target-based procedure task matching, and focused frontend/Python regression coverage. Tests: dashboard focused Jest list/dashboard tests, dashboard typecheck, focused Python procedure persistence tests.
